L2().details: Sets up the L2 contracts. Depends on `L1()` being called first.

disableUpgradedFork().details: Disables upgrade mode for testing. By default the fork testing env will be upgraded to the latest      implementation. This can be used to disable the upgrade which, is useful for tests targeting the upgrade      process itself.

enableAltDA().details: Enables alternative data availability mode for testing

returnIfForkTest(string).details: Returns early when running against a forked production network. Useful for allowing a portion of a test      to run.

skipIfCoverage().details: Skips tests when running in coverage mode.

skipIfForkTest(string).details: Skips tests when running against a forked production network.

skipIfOpsRepoTest(string).details: Skips tests when running against a forked production network using the superchain ops repo.

test_constructor_succeeds().details: Tests that the constructor sets the correct variables.

test_crossDomainOnlyOwner_notMessenger_r.details: Tests that the `XDomainSetter3` contract reverts for a non-messenger      caller after the ownership has been transferred to a new owner.

test_crossDomainOnlyOwner_notOwner2_reve.details: Tests that a relayed message to the `XDomainSetter3` contract reverts      after its ownership has been transferred to a new owner.

test_crossDomainOnlyOwner_notOwner_rever.details: Tests that the `XDomainSetter3` contract reverts after the ownership      has been transferred to a new owner.

test_crossDomainTransferOwnership_succee.details: Tests that `transferOwnership` succeeds when the caller is the      owner and the ownership is transferred non-locally.

test_localOnlyOwner_notOwner_reverts().details: Tests that `set` reverts when the caller is not the owner.

test_localOnlyOwner_succeeds().details: Tests that `onlyOwner` allows the owner to call a protected      function locally.

test_localTransferOwnership_succeeds().details: Tests that `transferOwnership` succeeds when the caller is the      owner and the ownership is transferred locally.

test_transferOwnershipNoLocal_succeeds().details: The existing transferOwnership(address) method still      exists on the contract.

test_transferOwnership_noLocalZeroAddres.details: Tests that `transferOwnership` reverts for ownership transfers      to the zero address.

test_transferOwnership_notOwner_reverts(.details: Tests that `transferOwnership` reverts when the caller is not the owner.

test_transferOwnership_zeroAddress_rever.details: Tests that `transferOwnership` reverts for ownership transfers      to the zero address when set locally.

artifacts().notice: The address of the Artifacts contract. Set into state by Deployer.setUp() with `etch` to avoid         mutating any nonces. MUST not have constructor logic.

isForkTest().notice: Indicates whether a test is running against a forked production network.
